dag_flow_prompt: Implement JWT authentication. Add POST /api/auth/login and POST /api/auth/register routes. Use bcrypt for password hashing and jsonwebtoken for token generation. Update app.js to mount the routes.
baseline_prompt: Implement JWT authentication. Add POST /api/auth/login and POST /api/auth/register routes. Use bcrypt for password hashing and jsonwebtoken for token generation. Update app.js to mount the routes.

user_context.persona: a backend developer building a task management REST API

feature_requirements.storage: In-memory array in src/models/user.js. No database for now.
feature_requirements.jwt_secret_source: Environment variable JWT_SECRET, fallback to 'dev-secret' for local dev

error_responses.user_already_exists: HTTP 409 with JSON { error: 'User already exists' }

user_context.answering_style: Terse and direct. Answers only what was asked. No fluff.
